speaker: speaker1
text: Let me tell you some more . The interest is settled on the 20th of the last month in each quarter , It's paid quarterly . Of course it also needs to be settled if you cancel the account .

speaker: speaker2
text: Miao Ping , in your opinion , should we go for the Type A or Type B Account ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , the Type B Account is very restricted . If your aim is to use the account the same way as your use your Settlement Account , I would recommend the Type A Account for you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks for your time . I'll go and discuss everything with my partner and I'll be back later .
